name: io.github.darwinphi/ph-schools
title: PH Schools MCP Server
description: Local stdio MCP server for searching and analyzing the Philippine schools masterlist dataset.

environmentVariables.name: PH_SCHOOLS_DATA_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a local schools dataset JSON file.

environmentVariables.name: PH_SCHOOLS_DATA_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional source URL used by sync-data.

environmentVariables.name: PH_SCHOOLS_DATA_TAG
environmentVariables.description: Optional canonical dataset tag used by sync-data when URL is not provided.
